title: BetterTorch+
description: Change the appearance of all torches to the new Redstone Torch 1.21.2 design created by Mojang. ✨
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c66409c9977b080db4fd09ff3fd439b81ad4cc7d.png)

![https://i.imgur.com/ghQF1wY.gif](https://i.imgur.com/ghQF1wY.gif)

## 📚 | ABOUT
• The Mojang team updated and modernized the appearance of the Redstone Torch in snapshot 24w33a (Java 1.21.2). However, the more common torches remained unchanged. So, I created this resource pack to update and make the other forgotten torches match this new and magnificent Redstone Torch visual! 💎✨

## 🏷️ | CREDITS
• Resource pack created by [t2rtle](https://modrinth.com/user/t2rtle) (ARR) ©️✨ 

## 📦 | MODPACKS & VIDEOS
• You may freely use this resource pack in any modpack as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth ecosystem. ☕✨

• You are also free and welcome to create video/stream content (YouTube, Twitch, TikTok, etc.), and it is not necessary to give credits or link to this page. However, if for any reason you want to provide the download to your viewers, you must link to this page and not distribute the download outside the Modrinth ecosystem. 📽️✨

## 📮 | QUESTIONS
• 01. Can I distribute your resource pack? 📌
> R: **No**. Do not distribute my projects anywhere. 📌
